'''竏嗷-ng-l-w''' ('''karanglewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lodge|lodge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lodge|lodge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-ng-l-w
|-
! Lemma
| karanglewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiranglewoko|thiranglewoko]] || [[word:jiranglewoko|jiranglewoko]] || [[word:shiranglewoko|shiranglewoko]] || [[word:kiranglewoko|kiranglewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuranglewoko|thuthuranglewoko]] || [[word:jujuranglewoko|jujuranglewoko]] || [[word:shushuranglewoko|shushuranglewoko]] || [[word:kukuranglewoko|kukuranglewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuranglewoko|thuranglewoko]] || [[word:juranglewoko|juranglewoko]] || [[word:shuranglewoko|shuranglewoko]] || [[word:kuranglewoko|kuranglewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuranglewoko|thuranglewoko]] || [[word:juranglewoko|juranglewoko]] || [[word:shuranglewoko|shuranglewoko]] || [[word:kuranglewoko|kuranglewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theranglewoko|theranglewoko]] || [[word:jeranglewoko|jeranglewoko]] || [[word:sheranglewoko|sheranglewoko]] || [[word:keranglewoko|keranglewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoranglewoko|thothoranglewoko]] || [[word:jojoranglewoko|jojoranglewoko]] || [[word:shoshoranglewoko|shoshoranglewoko]] || [[word:kokoranglewoko|kokoranglewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoranglewoko|thoranglewoko]] || [[word:joranglewoko|joranglewoko]] || [[word:shoranglewoko|shoranglewoko]] || [[word:koranglewoko|koranglewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoranglewoko|thoranglewoko]] || [[word:joranglewoko|joranglewoko]] || [[word:shoranglewoko|shoranglewoko]] || [[word:koranglewoko|koranglewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦranglewoko|thﾃｦranglewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦranglewoko|jﾃｦranglewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦranglewoko|shﾃｦranglewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦranglewoko|kﾃｦranglewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharanglewoko|thatharanglewoko]] || [[word:jajaranglewoko|jajaranglewoko]] || [[word:shasharanglewoko|shasharanglewoko]] || [[word:kakaranglewoko|kakaranglewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharanglewoko|tharanglewoko]] || [[word:jaranglewoko|jaranglewoko]] || [[word:sharanglewoko|sharanglewoko]] || [[word:karanglewoko|karanglewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharanglewoko|tharanglewoko]] || [[word:jaranglewoko|jaranglewoko]] || [[word:sharanglewoko|sharanglewoko]] || [[word:karanglewoko|karanglewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
